level1018-豌豆小喷菇PeaPuff: Hello there player! Welcome to Fusion Showcase levels. These levels are specially designed around the gimmicks of the showcased cross-world fusions and will present some interesting challenge. For the best experience, check the Almanac first and familiarize yourself with the plants and zombies involved in these levels. Have fun playing! Short plants that don't play fair! Tip: Fire Torch Ground Spike can pop balloons and ignite small peas. Iron Bean Little Spray Mushroom can be fused with Pea Little Spray Mushroom and Iron Bucket.
level1021-坚果小蘑菇:
They are so smol and adorable! And together they are strong!
These Tough Fruit Little Mushrooms are effective counters against Little Sand Beasts!
Tip: Short plants won't be directly hit by straight-firing zombie projectiles.
level1031-阳光菇:
Breaking!
After extended exposure to Lumos radiation, this is what happened to Sun Light Mushrooms...
Tip: Try feeding the "mutated" Sun Light Mushrooms to the zombies.
level1034-寒冰射手:
1-10 déjà vu, but they have returned!

Rigid Corpses have increased HP in this level, so make good use of knockbacks and the Extreme Cold Ice Beans!
Tip: Click on the Cold Ice Double Shot Shooter after 15s to upgrade it to Cold Ice Crack Pod Shooter. And Cold Ice Crack Pod Shooter to Cold Ice Machine Gun Shooter too!
level1048-地刺坚果-洋:
Ground Spike Tough Fruit can both reflect damage and pop tires.
How did the zombies drive up onto the roof?
Hold on, here comes Ground Spike Tough Fruit, to our rescue!
level1077-海光菇SeaSunShroom:
The water lanes are very safe in this level!
 So don't hesitate to plant down a bunch of Sun Light Sea Mushrooms for a strong economy!
Assemble and upgrade the Hamburger King using the plants as indicated by the sign!
level1111-阳光卷心菜:
Solar cabbages bounce once after hitting a zombie and gain an extra bounce
	for every 200 Sun you have, up to a max of 5 bounces. Each bounce drops 5 Sun!
level1116-冰瓜:
<size=140%>Memory Lane: Original Game Endless 4-Cannon Strat</size>
<u>High Difficulty Warning!</u>
Not recommended on D5 for non-expert players. Turn back to D3 for an enjoyable experience.













Big Spray Mushroom: "I have a bad feeling about this..." Jack-in-the-boxes: "Hehe Boi~"
Tips: Ice Melons can apply Chill to groups and deal 4× damage to frozen zombies.
Bonus points for completing the level with Ice Melon being the only fusion used.
level1147-魅惑坚果:
Charm Confuse Tough Fruit recovers 100 HP when hit by a Charm Confuse Little Courage Mushroom spore!
It summons a Hypnotized Yellow Gold Blind Box Rigid Corpse,
then fully heals after collecting 7 different spore colors!
Hypnotized Rigid Corpses ignore Type 2 armor when biting!
level1149-火瓜:
Fire Melon inflicts Enflamed on a large area.
It's usually the most important source for Enflamed in many strats.
Pair it with the high damage outputs of Iron Bucket West Melon Throwers and Super Tier Throwers to dish out unfair amounts of damage.
level1150-吸金磁GoldMagnet: Multiple Suck Gold Magnets can keep the plants in adjacent lanes shooting.
level1154-阳光磁力菇:
Sun Light Magnet Force Mushrooms can produce metal objects you can't normally get otherwise.
Metal objects are extremely useful for fusions, healing Machine Instrument Tough Fruits and feeding some Magnet Force Mushroom fusions.
Which strategy will you be using? Let's have a feast of metal objects!
Btw, don't forget some metal fusions require a Morph fusion first!
level1157-魅惑磁力菇HypnoMagnet:
Feed Metal Objects to Charm Confuse Magnet Force Mushroom to summon the corresponding hypnotized zombie!
Pair it with Sun Light Magnet Force Mushroom and Magnet Force 3 Leaf Grass to summon zombies more effectively!
level1158-磁力大喷菇MagnetFumeremake: Big Spray Mushrooms like to wear hats too!
level1163-土豆辣椒JalaMine:
Spicy Pepper Earth Bean Thunder still does a Earth Bean Thunder explosion when she dies
and spawns up to 7 quick-arming Earth Bean Thunders in her lane!
Tip: Earth Bean South Melon + 3 Line Earth Bean Thunder + Ladder can very effectively bring out 3 Line Earth Bean Thunder's explosive potential.
level1166-樱桃磁力菇CherryMagnet:
Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushroom, when given or attracting a metal object, can control it to cause cherry explosions!
Each object can be used up to 5 times, dealing 300 damage each time.
level1170-土豆小喷菇PotatoPuff:
Sun is scarce, so make good use of Earth Bean Little Spray Mushroom's reproduction ability to survive the early game.
	Rigid Corpse Blind Box, Sun Light Spicy Pepper, fusing Earth Bean Big Mouth Flower, and Sun Light Explode Bullet can all help you make Sun at different stages.
level1171-土豆胆小菇ScaredyPotato:
Earth Bean Little Courage Mushroom deals high damage at the cost its own HP for the first 20s.
Good for early game transition or clean-up.
(Recommended to pair with Cherry Peach Magnet Force Mushrooms on higher difficulties)
level1172-蒜大喷菇:
Big Garlic Spray Mushroom is great for stacking Poison points on hordes of zombies,
but it does not receive a damage bonus (unlike Big Garlic-infused lobbers).
level1178-樱桃树桩:
Saving Private Cherryan! Cherry Peach Tree Stump produces a homing cherry drone for every 30 projectiles ignited.
Use them to support and heal the Cherry Peach Tough Fruits in water lanes!
Use <u>Suck Gold Magnets</u> to keep the Machine Gun Pea Artillery Desks attacking!
Tip: By extinguishing the ignited peas they can be used to fuel the Cherry Peach Tree Stump again!
level1180-寒冰地刺:
Tip: You can place Flower Pots under Ground Spikes and to make them
untargetable by zombies and immune to Jack-in-the-Box explosions!
level1182-寒冰火炬IceTorch:
Extreme Cold Tree Stump turns peas into snow peas and snow peas into polar ice peas!
	Also enhances Water Drop Shooter and Supershooter's projectiles to inflict Deep Chill!
level1183-杨桃小喷: Foreign Peach Little Mushrooms are also short plants! And they're cute!
level1185-光叶保护伞LanternUmbrella:
Not only can Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella provide 1 Lumos level to nearby plants,
it also creates an energy shield to block damage from zombie projectiles (5:1).
When Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella gets damaged, energy is first consumed instead.
The higher the Lumos level, the faster the energy recovery.
level1185-流光保护伞LanternUmbrella:
Not only can Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella provide 1 Lumos level to nearby plants,
it also creates an energy shield to block zombie projectiles.
When Light Leaf Protect Guard Umbrella gets damaged, energy is first consumed instead.
The higher the Lumos level, the faster the energy recovery.
level1187-银向日葵: N.B.: The Glove has reduced CD in this level! Make sure you are familiar with Suck Gold Magnet's mechanic before attempting this level! Oh! Shiny! Gold Towards Sun Flower burns money to produce extreme amounts of Sun for you! You just need to use Coffee Bean on a Gold Towards Sun Flower to retrieve them... Tip: Machine Gun Pea Artillery Desk has amazing synergy with Suck Gold Magnet!
level1189-寒冰坚果:
Ice, ice, baby!
 Tips: Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruits heal 1000 HP when affected by Cold Ice Mushroom.
When Little Spray Mushrooms are fused, all other plants in the same tile are also fused (for example, <u>Pots</u>)!
Sun Light Cold Ice Mushroom triggers the Cold Ice Mushroom effect multiple times.
level1190-土豆南瓜:
Recommended for the front lines →






← Try fusing a Solar-mine as a Sun producer!               .




Don't underestimate Earth Bean Thunder fusions!
When there's a shortage of Potatoes, don't forget Explode-o-tato and Spicy Pepper Earth Bean Thunder!
West Melon Protect Guard Umbrella could interfere with the Potatoes' synergy if you bring it!
level1191-毁灭仙人掌:
Did you know? Doom Cacti are invincible when doing their Ultimate move!
Also their Ultimate moves shoot more projectiles in Slow Mode!
level1193-火焰大喷菇FireFume:
Fire Flame Big Spray Mushroom is a flamethrower that applies Enflamed!
  Challenge: Beat the level without bringing any other seed packets.
level1194-毁灭豌豆射手:
N.B.: The Glove has NO CD in this level!












Tip: Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooter and Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom have great synergy!
This coupled with Remaining Ember Tree Stump can dish out ridiculous amounts of damage.
Destroy Eradicate Pea Shooters also ignore Type 2 (handheld) armor!
Bonus Points for completing the level without planting extra Sun producers!
level1195-流光花盆LanternPot: Flow Light Flower Pot provides 1 Lumos level to the plant on top.
level1196-瓜喷优化:
Stun-lock the fast-moving zombies before they get out of hand!
One-shot them with charged West Melon Bounce Bounce Mushrooms!
P.S.: You can beat the level with just the pre-selected plants.
level1197-星星火炬: The Glove has no CD in this level. Use it effectively! The zombies will take longer to come in this level, use the time well to prepare! Look at the night... ground filled with stars! Foreign Peach Tree Stump can ignite most star projectiles that pass through. Place it directly to the right of a Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grass for better results! Please cherish every unique little star on your lawn……
level1198-辣椒杨桃: WARNING: The Glove in this level has double CD! Use it wisely! Bonus Challenge 1: Can you save all of your Towards Sun Flowers? Bonus Challenge 2: Can you beat the level without using Mine Worker Foreign Peach? Fire Burst Foreign Peach explodes like a Fire Burst Spicy Pepper and releases 25 spicy stars! Try collecting the spicy stars with Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grasss by planting Fire Burst Foreign Peachs near them! Tip: Fire Burst Spicy Pepper insta-kills all Snow Sled Vehicle Rigid Corpses!
level1199-余烬树桩:
Remaining Ember Tree Stump ignites lower-level fire peas and applies Irradiated to zombies.
Projectiles lit by Remaining Ember Tree Stump deal splash damage that ignores Type 2 armor.
Destroy Eradicate Tough Fruits heal when zombies with the Irradiated debuff are killed nearby.
level1200-胆南: The Glove has no CD in this level. Extra Challenge 1: Can you keep the Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom alive? Extra Challenge 2: Can you make 3000 Sun before the level ends? Strengthen Courage South Melon makes Little Courage Mushrooms fearless! Tip: Try moving your Strengthen Courage South Melon between different types of Scaredies~
level1201-杨桃胆小菇:
Foreign Peach Little Courage Mushroom gets afraid when there's a zombie in its attack range.
Use Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grass or Strengthen Courage South Melon to complement it!
level1203-小玉米投手CornPuff:
Jade Rice Little Throwers prioritize targeting non-shrunken zombies and lob butter that shrink them.
The butter can also stun shrunken zombies and insta-kill Little Devil Rigid Corpses.
level1204-浮空伞:
WARNING: VERY DIFFICULT LEVEL
The Glove has reduced CD.








Float Sky Protect Guard Umbrella is space-efficient but only protects 1 Tile.</size>
Protect your Flower Pots well! You won't get them back if you lose them!
Tip: Be careful, no one knows where the Burglar Bungees will drop the Mystery Garg.</size>
level1206-坚果保护伞NutUmbrella:
With high HP, Tough Fruit Protect Guard Umbrella can repeatedly knock back zombies for you!
Tip: Laddered Tough Fruit Protect Guard Umbrellas are still functional.
level1207-樱桃保护伞CherryUmbrella:
Cherry Peach Protect Guard Umbrella can redirect cherry explosions from the nearby 3×3 area to itself.
	Use the Rigid Corpse Glove to ladder your South Melons and keep the Cherry Peach Protect Guard Umbrellas charged!
level1209-磁力玉米MagnetCorn:
Try putting some Metal Objects on Magnet Force Jade Rice Throwers!
Super Time Space Jade Rice Thrower has amazing synergy with Super Time Space Pea Shooter!
level1212-寒冰樱桃IceCherry:
Frozen Cherries produce Cherry Peach Explode Bullets for you
after they have absorbed enough cherry projectiles!
Try out Cherry Peach Explode Bullet + Earth Bean Thunder too!
level1213-磁力毁灭菇:
Iron Bucket Destroy Eradicate Mushroom gives a Iron Bucket for every zombie killed!
Trade these to Sun Light Magnet Force Mushrooms for Sun or feed them to Machine Instrument Tough Fruits!
Play Doll Destroy Eradicate Mushroom triggers a chain explosion with 1800 damage for every zombie killed!
Super Time Space Destroy Eradicate Mushroom stun-locks the surviving zombies for 30s!
level1216-浮空豌豆射手:
Aaaand the Pea Shooter took off.
Tip: Float Sky Pea Shooter syncs its the attack speed with that of the plant below it.
Float Sky Pea Shooter misses Duck Save Life Circle Rigid Corpses due to sprite offsets. Use 3 Line Fire Torch Tree Stump to reset projectile position.
Destroy Eradicate Little Courage Mushroom attacks very fast but is slow to set up. Make use of 3 Line Fire Torch Tree Stump/Cherry Peach Tree Stump to cover for the other lanes!
level1230-魅惑大蒜:
Charm Confuse Mushroom + Big Garlic
The Glove has significantly longer CD in this level!
Try redirecting hypnotized zombies by letting them walk into Charm Confuse Big Garlic!
level1231-魅惑土豆雷HypnoMine:
The Glove has no CD in this level!
Try moving an armed Charm Confuse Earth Bean Thunder into a group of zombies!
level1233-水路水草雷:
Place [Earth Bean Thunder] on a [Tangle Surround Water Grass] for [Tangle Surround Water Thunder] →                         ← This is [Tangle Surround Water Thunder]







				 Place [Tangle Surround Water Grass] on a [Earth Bean Thunder] for [Tangle Surround Ground Thunder] →                        ← This is [Tangle Surround Ground Thunder]
   


The Glove has no CD in this level. Use it to your heart's content!
 [Tangle Surround Water Thunder] drowns a zombie in a water lane and deals extra AoE damage!
[Tangle Surround Ground Thunder] suffocates a land zombie!
Combine these two to resist the zombies!
level1235-火焰坚果FireNut:
Fire Flame Tough Fruits reflect 20 damage and inflict Enflamed when bitten, and can be upgraded into
Fire Flame Tall Tough Fruits which is tall and can also heal by 3k HP when affected by Fire Burst Spicy Pepper.
level1240-三线土豆雷:
The Glove has no CD in this level.
Sometimes you need to play more aggresively: Actively move 3 Line Earth Bean Thunders into zombies!
Don't forget to use Sleep Lilys to spawn 3 Line Shooters!
level1241-灯笼大嘴花:
Increased Lumos levels reduce Digestion time of Lantern Cage Big Mouth Flowers, down to 10s!
N.B.: Most Lumos System plants can be buffed by increasing Lumos levels.
level1243-樱桃花盆CherryPot:
Cherry Peach Flower Pots heal the plant above when hit by Cherry explosions and boost the attack speed of Cherry-type shooters
  (Frozen Pear counterattacks also count as Cherry explosions and can trigger nearby Cherry Peach Flower Pots)
Use Cherry defensive plants and Cherry Peach Flower Pot healing to charge up Cherry Peach Protect Guard Umbrellas!
level1244-三叶小樱桃:
The Glove in this level has no CD.
3 Leaf Little Cherry Peach attacks every 15s, perfect for clean-ups!
Chip away the HP of bulkier zombies with the on-fusion explosion of 3 Leaf Little Cherry Peachs!
level1245-阳光大蘑菇:
Collect enough Sun to beat the zombies! 
Tip: Sun Light Big Mushroom can absorb Sun in a 5×5 area and multiply their value by 30%!
Bonus points for planting down a Gold Towards Sun Flower before the Trophy drops!
level1246-阳光胆小菇:
The Scaredy family!
	Tip: Sun Light Little Courage Mushroom produces Sun faster and faster but resets speed when scared.
level1248-毁葵: N.B.: The Glove has reduced CD in this level! The zombies will take longer to come in this level, use the time well to prepare! Caution! Risk of Explosion. Destroy Eradicate Towards Sun Flowers produce Doom spores for you that explode like Destroy Eradicate Mushrooms when fully grown! But beware! Grown Doom spores are very sensitive and easily explode! Tip: Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosions on water leave no craters!
level1250-窝瓜坚果:
Chicken Jockeys can quickly tear through your defense!
Perhaps the jumping Squash Melon Tough Fruits can diverge the zombies into 2 groups?
Separate the fast-moving and the slow-moving Rigid Corpses!
Make good use of Cold Ice 3 Leaf Grasss to maximize Squash Melon Tough Fruits' potential!
level1251-银毁灭菇:
Try keeping zombies in range of Destroy Eradicate Mushroom explosions.
Bonus points for completing the level with only the selected plants.
level1255-三叶坚果:
3 Leaf Tough Fruit can tank damage for the plant below it and has 4000 HP
It begins to heal at a speed of 10 HP per sec 10s after the last damage instance.
Maybe you should pair it with plants that take fixed amounts of damage?
level1257-杨桃坚果:
Foreign Peach Tough Fruit fires five 20-damage stars when damaged.
Foreign Peach Tough Fruits and Foreign Peach 5 Leaf Grasss still work even when frozen by Snowballs.
level1261-西瓜坚果MelonNut:
West Melon Tough Fruit charges up when damaged.
After charging, it launches a Melon with high damage and gains a temporary shield.
However, they are not cheap. So keep that Sun production rolling!
level1262-卷心菜坚果CabbageNut:
Roll Heart Vegetable Ping Pong Mushroom can keep bouncing the Roll Heart Vegetable Tough Fruit's counterattack!
Bonus points if you beat the level with only the pre-selected seed packets!
level1263-黄油坚果:
Yellow Oil Tough Fruit can shut the zombies up.
Because it's indeed very tasty.
level1273-浮空胆小菇:
3 Leaf Little Courage Mushroom protects cowering Scaredy-type plants in a 3 by 3 area from being eaten!
However, zombie projectiles and crushing cannot be prevented.
Try close the circle of Cold Ice Little Courage Mushroom and Little Courage Tough Fruit to make zombies unable to advance!
Hint: Sometimes you don't want your Scaredies to be ignored. Just move then out of the Camo areas in that case.
level1274-樱桃胆小菇CherryScaredy:
Cherry Peach Little Courage Mushrooms can blow up all kinds of zombies!
Try to manually keep 'em blasting with Strengthen Courage South Melon!
level1277-毁灭杨桃DoomStar:
<size=20>Wait, did I forget to bring something?
What about the water lanes and flying zombies? ....Oh!</size>

<size=16>Hint: meteors not only decimate aquatic and airborne reptiles, but zombies too.</size>
level1279-磁力坚果:
Rings of Ice and Fire! Magnet Force Tough Fruit can store up to 100 projectiles at once!
Did you know? Attracted projectiles are released after passing through Fire Torch Tree Stumps!
Don't forget about Olive Machine Gun Shooter! We recommend playing Suck Gold Magnet's level first!
level1280-小西瓜投手MelonPuff:
Slicd-pults deal 2× damage to shrunken zombies!
	You can fuse a West Melon South Melon, a West Melon Flower Pot and 3 West Melon Little Throwers with just 1 West Melon Thrower!
level1281-小卷心菜:
Roll Heart Vegetable Little Throwers lob sprouts that spread the shrinking effect!
These sprouts bounce can twice.
level1282-火炬坚果NutTorch: Tough Fruit Fire Torch Tree Stump produces a Flame Light Tough Fruit for every 50 projectiles ignited.
level1284-银坚果:
Put the Fuse Together Ocean Taro here →             ← On the middle Big Mouth Flower









Time is money, money is health.
Gold Tough Fruit restores to full HP and gains max HP every time it unleashes an Ultimate
Extra Challenge: Beat the level without bringing any extra plants.
level1286-魅惑西瓜HypnoMelon:
Charm Confuse West Melon Thrower has a 25% chance to hypnotize zombies with half health or less.
First lower the zombies' HP with Iron Bucket West Melon Throwers and then hypnotize them!
level1287-寒冰花盆:
Cold Ice Flower Pots de-roast plants so that they can be used in fusions again!
Build your defense from de-roasted plants! (Iron Bucket Squash Melon + Squash Melon South Melon or Giant Size Tough Fruits. 
Choose your build and shovel the other Fire Torch Tree Stump fusions not needed!)
level1288-火炬南瓜:
N.B.:<u>The Glove has half the CD in this level.</u>
If you got fire please prioritize fusing regular Machine Gun Shooters to ensure supply for Fire Torch South Melon and Pea South Melon.


















A Song of Fire and Ice
You can make a fire build or an ice build depending on what cannon you get initially.
Fire Torch South Melon produces a Flame Light South Melon after igniting 50 projectiles.
Cold Ice Flower Pots can transform Flame Light South Melons back into regular South Melons.
level1291-海鲨菇:
Feed Sea Mushrooms to Sea Shark Big Spray Mushrooms to make them temporarily gain a full-lane range!
	Sea Shark Big Spray Mushrooms further knock back zombies that have just been knocked back by Sea Demon Mushrooms!
level1293-海坚果:
Sea Mushroom Tough Fruits take time to grow and roll away when fully grown.
Tip: You can move a rolling Sea Mushroom Tough Fruit with the Glove!
Use Tough Fruit-colored Sleep Lily to periodically spawn Tough Fruits for you and turn these into Sea Mushroom Tough Fruits!
level1294-海螺胆小菇SeaScaredyshroom:
Use the Sea Conch Little Courage Mushroom + 3 Leaf Little Courage Mushroom combo to trick the Dolphin Riders into jumping early!
Remember to get free Sun from fusing Sea Conch Little Courage Mushrooms!
level1295-三线坚果:
“ Tall ” Tough Fruit Shooter is a front defense both durable and powerful!
Their piercing ability and high-damage shots are not to be underestimated!
They have different phases at different stages of HP.
level1296-寻宝土豆雷TreasureMine:
Search Treasure Earth Bean Thunder digs for treasure every 30s with a chance to turn up resources, plants and less frequently zombies.
When on a treasure tile, he digs every 20s and the chance to find zombies is reduced to 0.
Tip: They still explode on death, so you glove one and throw him at the zombies in an emergency.
level1297-寒冰刺豚:
Feed Sea Mushrooms to Cold Ice Spike Pig Mushrooms to freeze a 3×3 area!
Cold Ice Cat Tail Grasss prioritize frozen zombies.
level1298-豌豆大喷菇PeaFume: Peas are not the only type of projectiles Pea Big Spray Mushroom can boost.
level1299-坚果南瓜: N.B.: The Glove has reduced CD in this level! Wow! Pickled eggs! Tough Fruit South Melon heals damaged South Melons nearby! When no South Melon needs healing, they produce Tough Fruits for you! Tips: Keep the Mine Worker South Melons alive! They can force Mine Worker Rigid Corpses to emerge!
level1301-小伞SmallUmbrella:
Protect Guard Umbrella Little Mushrooms repopulates every 30s.
They lose 50 HP when knocking back shrunken zombies, and disappear when knocking back non-shrunken ones.
Try their combo with Super Tier Little Pine Furnace and Protect Guard Umbrella Flower Pot to effectively keep shrunken zombies at bay!
level1302-海蘑菇群PuffSeaShroom:
The Glove in this level has no CD.
Sea Mushroom Group automatically feeds the plant directly in front with a Sea Mushroom
every 15s and if unsuccessful, drops a Sea Mushroom seed packet instead.
level1303-毁灭海鲸菇:
Feed the Destroy Eradicate Sea Whale Mushrooms! Use Sea Mushroom Groups to auto-feed them!
	Fortify your defense with Castle Rampart Tough Fruits and Sea Demon Mushrooms to stall for Destroy Eradicate Sea Whale Mushrooms!
level1305-水母魅惑菇:
Feed Sea Mushrooms to Water Mother Charm Confuse Mushrooms to instantly summon a Browncoat!
Hypnotized zombies can stop Hydrofowls.
level1307-阳桃:
Solar Storm!
N.B.: The Glove has half the CD in this level!
















Produce copious amounts of Sun to WIN!
Tip: Fit Sun Light Foreign Peachs with <u>Foreign Peach South Melons</u> to enable auto-attack!
Recommended plants: Sun Light Spicy Pepper, Sun Light Cold Ice Mushroom, Lumo-shroom, Gold Towards Sun Flower
level1310-坚果胆小菇:
Little Courage Tough Fruit can knock back zombies in 3 lanes when standing up
and pairs surprisingly well with Cold Ice Little Courage Mushroom!
(Olive Machine Gun Shooter is recommended for higher difficulties)
level1311-坚果花盆NutPot:
Tough Fruit Flower Pot is immune to Lava tiles!
And also provides a 20% incoming damage reduction for the plant above.
level1312-坚果大喷: Feast of Nuts Tip: Tough Fruit Big Mushroom uses nearby Tough Fruit Little Mushrooms as projectiles for huge damage. Damage is dependent on Tough Fruit Little Mushrooms' HP and ignores Type 2 armor.
level1313-水草坚果KelpNut:
Water Grass Tough Fruit is resistant to crush and applies 1 Tangle point
to the zombie biting or crushing it!
level1314-磁力西瓜MagnetMelonpult:
Try giving some Metal Objects to Magnet Force West Melon Throwers!
Chrono Plants have amazing synergy!
level1317-毁灭辣椒:
M.A.D. also destroys plants to trigger Doom explosions at their positions with a chance to return seed packets.
Stacked Little Spray Mushrooms can only trigger one explosion
but the seed packet(s) dropped by any one of them can be used 3 times.
level1318-豌豆南瓜:
Pea South Melon is basically an IFV! Sun Light Flower Pots already make sufficient Sun!
Use Elemental Cannons to quicky set up the corresponding defense!
Choose the build you would like to play with! Bonus points for using different Peas in different lanes!
level1319-火爆豌豆-:
Blaze peas inflict Enflamed debuff
and turn into Phoenix peas after passing through Super Tier Fire Torch Tree Stump.
level1325-阳光寒冰菇SunIceShroom:
Sun Light Cold Ice Mushroom produces Sun 3 times before disappearing.
The first 2 times it chills all zombies and the last time freezes all zombies.
It produces an extra 15 Sun for every frozen zombie present when it produces Sun, signaled by a glowing effect.
Tip: The chill effect on Sun production can also charge Snow plants and heal Cold Ice Tall Tough Fruits.
level1326-阳光魅惑菇SunHypno:
On being bitten, Sun Light Charm Confuse Mushroom summons a Solar Comet
that bounces between zombies for Sun (hypnotized ones drop more Sun)
The Glove in this level has no CD but you have 0 initial Sun.
level1327-大嘴南瓜:
Big Mouth South Melons can help Big Mouth Flowers digest quickly, but also refresh the Devour ability of Super Tier Big Mouth Flowers!
Construct your defense with a plethora of carnivorous plants!
  (The Glove in this level has no CD)
level1330-樱桃三线优化CherryThreePeater (2):
Cherry Peach 3 Line Shooters shoot half-ripe cherries that explode after 6s.
	The more cherry-type damage the zombie takes during this time, the more damage the explosion deals.
level1332-毁灭樱桃:
Destroy Eradicate Cherry Peach's Destroy Eradicate Mushroom blast deals 300 more damage
for each zombie caught in the initial Cherry Peach Explode Bullet explosion.
Try fusing it in a zombie crowd!
level1333-樱桃魅惑菇CherryHypno:
Rigid Corpses that consume Cherry Peach Charm Confuse Mushroom get turned into hypnotized Cherry Peach Shooters!
		Press V for the Rigid Corpse Glove and station them at Charm Confuse South Melons to keep them around!
level1335-魅惑大嘴花:
Charm Confuse Big Mouth Flower can devour Hypnotized Rigid Corpses and recycle Charm Confuse Mushrooms!
Sun is limited in this level, so try mass-producing Charm Confuse Mushrooms
by combining Sea Mushroom Groups, Water Mother Charm Confuse Mushrooms and Charm Confuse Big Mouth Flowers!
level1337-黄油地刺CornCaltrop:
N.B.: The Glove has half the CD in this level!
Although it does no damage, Yellow Oil Ground Spike frequently stuns the zombies above
and is immune to most vehicle crushing effects.
level1340&&1339-海雷&&雷海:
Wait for your Mines to grow for bigger explosion radius!
The Glove has no CD in this level.




<size=20>These Mines are amphibious and start out armed.
They grow every 15s, twice, each growth gaining more damage and bigger range.
Did you know? Earth Bean Thunders ignore Type 2 (Handheld) armor.</size>
level1346-黄油黏黏菇CornFume:
Click on Yellow Oil Sticky Sticky Mushroom to trade its max HP for a group buttering attack!
Butter can stun zombies and even interrupt their abilities!
level1349-小喷南瓜:
Little Mushroom South Melons slowly regenerate HP!
They can absorb damage for the plant inside when their HP exceed 2700.
Use South Melon on a Little Mushroom South Melon to instantly restore it to full health!
level1353-土豆窝瓜块茎:
Earth Bean Squash Melon Chunck Stem spawns a Earth Bean Squash Melon every 15s. The Squash Melon damage
from Earth Bean Squash Melon can nullify Clown-in-the-Box's on-death effect!
level1356-杨桃大喷菇StarFume:
Foreign Peach Big Mushroom's projectile pierces twice and splits into 5 stars every hit.
The star cap projectile deals no damage but the stars
that split from it can be boosted by Pea Big Spray Mushroom.
level1358-流光大喷菇LanternFume:
Flow Light Big Lantern Mushroom's lasers target the whole lane and has infinite pierce.
The damage increases with Lumos level and proximity with the target.
It can dish out great damage when paired with Lumos providers.
level1362-土豆大喷菇PotatoFume:
Earth Bean Big Spray Mushroom releases a 300-damage explosion at each zombie hit every 15s.
It's very effective against hordes.
level1364-土豆毁灭菇PotatoDoom:
When Destroy Eradicate Earth Bean Thunder explodes, it also triggers a Destroy Eradicate Mushroom effect that leaves a crater,
then throws potato chunks onto 5 empty tiles.
If the ingredient Earth Bean Thunder is already armed, the resulting Destroy Eradicate Earth Bean Thunder also starts out armed.
level1365-寒冰卷心菜IceCabbage:
Cold Ice Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower chills and adds 10 Cryo points to zombies.
On hitting a Frozen zombie, deals quadruple damage, the projectile can bounce once,
and Cold Ice Roll Heart Vegetable Thrower's attack speed is greatly increased for 3s.
level1367-银寒冰菇SilverIceShroom (2):
Gold Cold Ice Mushroom launches Ice Spikes and can lower Cryo caps!
Group up zombies with Big Garlics and freeze them up!
level1369-卷心弹弹菇CabbageFume:
Roll Heart Vegetable Ping Pong Mushroom can continuously bounce a lobbed projectile back and forth.
Plant some heavy-hitting catapults behind to maximize the damage potential!
(Unrelated to this level, but Destroy Eradicate Sea Whale Mushroom counts too)
level1372-地刺花盆CaltropPot:
Ground Spike Flower Pot provides 50% to Ground Spike Tough Fruits above.
Protect your Ground Spike Tough Fruits with it and Peaceful Safe Fruit.
It can also be fused directly on bare ground and take out vehicles!
level1373-流光豌豆LanternPea:
N.B.: The Glove has halved CD in this level!
The higher the Lumos level, the faster Flow Light Pea Shooter charges and the more damage it does!
Flow Light Double Shot Shooter and Flow Light Machine Gun Shooter can target 2 and 4 zombies respectively. Click on them to switch targets.
Flow Light Middle Continue Shooter can only target 1, but can receive charges from other Flow Light Pea Shooters from behind for crazy damage.
level1377-水草苗KelpPuff:
When a zombie approaches, Water Grass Sprout bursts into 30 kelp projectiles.
	When a zombie is killed by any Kelp projectile in the water, a Water Grass Sprout is spawned.
level1389-火炬大喷菇TorchFume:
Fire Torch Big Spray Mushroom does not attack proactively but burns
absorbed peas and releases fire forward.
It deals the same amount of damage to zombies in the 4-tile range
as the burned peas with each burst capped at 300 damage.
